text:
よろしい。
これにて二段階目の特訓はクリア。

どうかしら。
少しぐらいは動きが変わったと
実感できるんじゃない？

私から見てみればまだまだだけど
動き自体は良くなってきているわ。
それは保証しましょう。

それじゃ、やる気があるなら
また次の特訓で会い

Very good. You've cleared the second level of
boot camp.

What do you think? Don't you feel like your
movements are a little more refined now?

You've still got room to grow, but you're a
natural at this. Improvement can and will come
in time. I guarantee it.

See you at another round of boot camp--if
you're feeling suitably motivated, that is.
